provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, middle-aged human woman with medical knowledge and no license to practice it, wearing a mix of Compact medical whites now grey from re-use over a dark thermal undersuit, a battered medical kit held together with tape, surgical gloves that have been washed and reused too many times, no official insignia just a hand-painted red cross on her sleeve, comfortable shoes, she treats everyone who can pay and some who cannot
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero, symmetrical matching armor

judgment.explanation: Sable Reach outlaw. Salvaged, stolen, and improvised gear. Nothing matches, nothing is new, everything tells a survival story.
